title: najas major
intro: Najas major, also known as the hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Najadaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Najas major include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Najas major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
